name: GREENLITE VENTURES INC
business: We are a carbon offsets marketing company. Initially, we intend to sell carbon offsets through our website to voluntary markets where no verification is required. Once we are able to complete the verification process, we will sell verified carbon offsets through other markets.
sellsTo: voluntary markets (companies, foundations, and other entities for CSR)

exposures.sentence: We are a carbon offsets marketing company.
